products.name: Dehydrated Onion - White
products.description: Premium dehydrated white onions processed from selected fresh onions, preserving natural aroma and flavor.
products.packaging: 14-15 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

variants.label: White Onion Flakes
variants.description: Dehydrated white onion flakes suitable for seasoning, soups, and ready meals.

variants.label: White Onion Chopped
variants.description: Uniform chopped white onion pieces for culinary applications.

variants.label: White Onion Minced
variants.description: Fine white onion minced particles ideal for dressings, sauces, and instant mixes.

variants.label: White Onion Granules
variants.description: Coarse white onion granules for spice blends and textured seasonings.

variants.label: White Onion Powder
variants.description: Fine white onion powder (80-100 mesh) for flavor seasoning and industrial food processing.

products.name: Dehydrated Onion - Red
products.description: Red onions dehydrated to retain maximum color, aroma, and pungency in various forms.
products.packaging: 14-15 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

variants.label: Red Onion Flakes
variants.description: Dehydrated red onion flakes ideal for salads, seasoning mixes, and sauces.

variants.label: Red Onion Chopped
variants.description: Dehydrated chopped red onions for instant food preparations.

variants.label: Red Onion Minced
variants.description: Minced red onion for gravies, ready-to-eat products, and seasoning.

variants.label: Red Onion Granules
variants.description: Red onion granules with uniform color and consistency for dry blends.

variants.label: Red Onion Powder
variants.description: Fine red onion powder for instant soups, batters, and snack coatings.

products.name: Dehydrated Onion - Pink
products.description: Mild pink onions dehydrated for specialized food processing and seasoning mixes.
products.packaging: 14-15 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

variants.label: Pink Onion Flakes
variants.description: Pink onion flakes for seasoning and ready-to-use food formulations.

variants.label: Pink Onion Chopped
variants.description: Uniform chopped pink onion pieces.

variants.label: Pink Onion Minced
variants.description: Fine pink onion minced particles.

variants.label: Pink Onion Granules
variants.description: Uniform pink onion granules.

variants.label: Pink Onion Powder
variants.description: Fine pink onion powder for seasoning and coloring.

products.name: Dehydrated Fried Onion
products.description: Golden crispy fried onions, prepared under hygienic conditions, ideal for toppings and ready meals.
products.packaging: 10-12 kg strong poly bag inside carton or custom vacuum pack

variants.label: Fried Onion Flakes
variants.description: Crispy fried onion flakes for toppings, garnishing, and instant noodles.

variants.label: Crispy Fried Onion
variants.description: Finely fried crispy onions for ready-to-eat dishes and industrial food manufacturing.

products.name: Dehydrated Garlic
products.description: Aromatic dehydrated garlic of Indian origin, processed in multiple cut sizes.
products.packaging: 25 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

variants.label: Garlic Flakes
variants.description: Dehydrated garlic flakes with full flavor profile preservation, ideal for soups and seasonings.

variants.label: Garlic Chopped
variants.description: Chopped garlic particles for instant meals and seasoning.

variants.label: Garlic Minced
variants.description: Minced garlic particles for dry mixes and spice blends.

variants.label: Garlic Granules
variants.description: Garlic granules for consistent metering in automated packaging lines.

variants.label: Garlic Powder
variants.description: Fine garlic powder (80-100 mesh) for institutional and industrial food formulations.

products.name: Spices
products.short: Dry mango, ginger, tomato, lemon, tamarind, turmeric powders
products.description: Pure ground spices and dehydrated powders derived from fresh natural ingredients.
products.packaging: Bulk multiwall paper bags or as per client specifications

variants.label: Dry Mango Powder
variants.description: Sweet, tangy mango powder (Amchur) for snacks, seasonings, and souring.

variants.label: Ginger Powder
variants.description: Pungent, warming ginger powder for baking, spices, and tea blends.

variants.label: Tomato Powder
variants.description: Micronized tomato powder with rich red color and taste for instant soups and seasoning.

variants.label: Lemon Powder
variants.description: Zesty dehydrated lemon powder for beverages and snack flavorings.

variants.label: Tamarind Powder
variants.description: Concentrated tamarind powder offering traditional sour-sweet notes.

variants.label: Turmeric Powder / Fingers
variants.description: Vibrant yellow turmeric powder or whole dried fingers with high curcumin content.

products.name: Peanuts
products.description: Premium peanuts sourced from major Indian crop zones, graded and processed for retail/wholesale distribution.
products.packaging: Vacuum packed pouches or 25 kg bags

variants.label: Salted Peanuts
variants.description: Evenly roasted, crunchy salted peanuts.

variants.label: Masala Peanuts
variants.description: Crispy peanuts seasoned in an Indian masala spice blend.

variants.label: Blanch Peanuts
variants.description: Premium whole or split blanched skinless peanuts ready for roasting or processing.
